heading: Definitions
label: 18921 Definitions
notes: References in TextExecutive Order No. 13800, referred to in par. (3), is set out as a note preceding , Domestic Security.section 1500 of Title 6

children.heading: Director
children.label: 1 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the National Institute of Standards and Technology.

children.heading: Enrollment of needy students
children.label: 2 Enrollment of needy students
children.text: The term “enrollment of needy students” has the meaning given the term in .section 1058(d) of title 20

children.heading: Framework
children.label: 3 Framework
children.text: The term “Framework” means the Framework for Improving Critical Infrastructure Cybersecurity developed by the National Institute of Standards and Technology and referred to in Executive Order No. 13800 issued on (82 Fed. Reg. 22391 et seq.).May 11, 2017

children.heading: Institute
children.label: 4 Institute
children.text: The term “Institute” means the National Institute of Standards and Technology.

children.heading: International standards organization
children.label: 5 International standards organization
children.text: The term “international standards organization” has the meaning given such term in .section 2571 of title 19

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 6 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Commerce.
